name: First Majestic Silver Corp.
description: First Majestic Silver Corp. is a silver and gold producer focused on operations in Mexico and the United States, headquartered in Vancouver, Canada. The company operates the San Dimas Silver/Gold Mine and La Encantada Silver Mine in Mexico, and expanded into the U.S. via the Santa Elena and Los Gatos mines. Note: First Majestic changed its TSX ticker symbol from FR to AG in May 2024 — verify the correct ticker before processing.
